meta.description: Polls each connected BDE Gmail mailbox for new messages on threads the platform started, and forwards them to the API for Claude-based sentiment classification. Never modifies pipeline state itself -- it only reports; a human still decides whether to advance a lead to Interested/Meeting.

nodes.name: Gmail: List Recent Inbox Messages
nodes.notesInFlow: One instance of this node per connected mailbox credential -- n8n Cloud/self-hosted supports iterating credentials via a Sub-workflow per BDE, configured in the Credential Vault.

nodes.name: Callback: Reply Received
nodes.notesInFlow: A 404 here (see n8nWebhookService.handleReplyReceived) means the thread doesn't match any email the platform sent -- safe to ignore, logged by n8n's execution history for spot-checking.
